forecasts.short: Scattered Rain Showers then Mostly Cloudy
forecasts.detailed: Scattered rain showers between 8pm and midnight. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 38. Northwest wind 0 to 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecasts.short: Chance Rain Showers then Patchy Frost
forecasts.detailed: A chance of rain showers before 9pm, then patchy frost. Partly cloudy, with a low around 38. Northwest wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
